news.title: AI compute shifts to inference, reshaping data center bottlenecks
news.description: The focus of artificial intelligence computing is set to shift from training to inference beyond 2025, a transition that will also redefine system bottlenecks across data centers, according to DIGITIMES Research.

news.title: Apple to open Siri to rival AI services beyond ChatGPT
news.description: Apple plans to open its Siri voice assistant to rival artificial intelligence (AI) services, moving beyond its partnership with OpenAI, according to Bloomberg and Reuters.

news.title: One man, his dog, and ChatGPT: Australia's AI vaccine saga
news.description: An Australian man used artificial intelligence to design a personalised experimental treatment for his dog who was sick with terminal cancer.

news.title: Google Gemini Sends More Traffic To Sites Than Perplexity: Report via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern
news.description:
Google Gemini more than doubled its referral traffic to websites in two months while ChatGPT declined from its peak, SE Ranking data shows. 
The post Google Gemini Sends More Traffic To Sites Than Perplexity: Report appeared first on Search Engine Journal.

news.description: SoftBank Group Corp. has secured a US$40 billion bridge loan to support its ongoing investment in US artificial intelligence developer OpenAI, marking one of the largest dollar-denominated borrowings in the Japanese conglomerate's history. The unsecured loan,…

news.title: Why OpenAI really shut down Sora | TechCrunch
news.description: OpenAI's decision last week to shut down Sora, its AI video-generation tool, just six months after releasing it to the public raised immediate suspicions. The app had invited users to upload their own faces — so was this some kind of elaborate data grab?
